title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: End-to-end enterprise systems with Java Spring Boot backends, secure REST APIs, and modern Angular frontends.
metaDescription: Portfolio of Annamalai Kathiresan, a Senior Full Stack Developer specializing in Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, and Angular.

pillars.title: Full Stack Architecture
pillars.description: End-to-end system design across monolithic and microservices architectures — from SQL tuning and API contracts to micro-frontends.

pillars.title: API & Data Layer
pillars.description: Designing secure RESTful APIs, database schemas, authentication flows, and integration patterns for enterprise-scale applications.

pillars.title: Delivery & DevOps
pillars.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cross-functional leadership bridging backend services with polished user interfaces.

items.title: Tata Communications — Enterprise Platform
items.description: Architected full-stack delivery for licensed Angular products with API-driven micro-frontends. Designed service contracts, managed CI/CD pipelines, and coordinated backend integration for modular deployment.

items.title: Comcast — Bulk Operations API
items.description: Built Bulk Invite and Bulk Modem Restart flows end-to-end — REST API integration, NgRx state orchestration, and batch processing that improved onboarding efficiency by 75%.

items.title: ETS — TOEFL Learn Mobile
items.description: Full-stack mobile solution with React Native frontend and AWS Amplify backend. Cognito auth, GraphQL APIs, and 90% cross-platform code reuse across iOS and Android.

items.title: Verizon — Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Delivered data-rich dashboards with Angular frontend consuming REST APIs. Adobe Analytics integration, query optimization, and 30% load time reduction through full-stack performance tuning.
Lead full-stack delivery for enterprise products — API architecture, Angular frontends, CI/CD pipelines, and cross-team integration between backend services and UI modules.
End-to-end development across Verizon, ETS, and Comcast. Owned feature delivery from API integration through UI implementation, with focus on scalable Angular and Spring-based systems.

contact.message: I'm always open to discussing full-stack architecture, API design, or opportunities to build robust enterprise systems end-to-end.
